## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m py_compile app.py`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] Dashboard tested locally
- [ ] Data-source status and timestamps checked

## Model And Data Review

- [ ] No prediction-time data leakage introduced
- [ ] Instrument or source changes are documented
- [ ] Backtest assumptions and transaction costs remain explicit
- [ ] Generated caches and secrets are not included

## Screenshots

Include screenshots for visible dashboard changes.
